news.headline: Manulife Financial Corp. set up Automatic Share Repurchase Plan with designated broker to repurchase shares. TORONTO, Feb. 24, 2025.
news.summary: Manulife Financial Corporation, trading under the symbols TSX/NYSE/PSE: MFC and SEHK: 945, disclosed on February 24, 2025, in Toronto that it initiated an automatic share repurchase plan. This plan entails the company's designated broker buying back shares of the firm. The specifics of the repurchase plan were not disclosed.

news.headline: Vale's subsidiary, Vale Overseas, offers to purchase up to US$450M in aggregate principal amount of notes due 2034, 2039, and 2036.
news.summary: In Rio de Janeiro on February 24, 2025, Vale Overseas Limited, a subsidiary of Vale S.A., has initiated a cash purchase offer labeled the "Offers" with a maximum value of US$450,000,000. This offer pertains to the acquisition of aggregate principal amount for undisclosed purposes.

news.headline: CME Group and DTCC plan to enhance cross-margining benefits by December 2025 for global financial services.
news.summary: In major financial hubs like New York, London, Hong Kong, Singapore, and Sydney, on February 24, 2025, CME Group, the top derivatives marketplace, partnered with The Depository Trust & Clearing Corporation (DTCC), the leading post-trade market infrastructure in the global financial sector. This collaboration brings together two prominent players in the industry to enhance operations and services worldwide.

news.headline: Columbia Banking System's President & CEO Clint Stein to present at Raymond James & RBC Capital Markets conferences on March 3, 2025 at 4:00 p.m. ET. (44 words)
news.summary: In Tacoma, Washington, on February 24th, 2025, Clint Stein, the President and CEO of Columbia Banking System, Inc. ("Columbia" Nasdaq: COLB), is set to speak at the Raymond James & Associates 46th Annual Institutional Investors Conference. The event is scheduled for Monday, March 3, 2025, at 4:00 p.m. Eastern Time. Mr. Stein will address attendees during this conference.

news.headline: BofA clients' digital interactions reach record 26B, up 12% y-o-y. 20M use Erica®; AI assistant interactions surpass 2.5B.
news.summary: Erica®, an AI-driven virtual assistant, has become a popular choice for managing finances among 20 million clients. The interactions with Erica® have surpassed 2.5 billion. Bank of America reported a significant 12% increase in digital interactions by clients in the past year, marking a record high of 26 billion interactions.

news.headline: Sandstorm Gold Royalties provides updates on assets: Platreef expansion studies, FDN resource growth, Argentine project progress.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on February 24, 2025, Sandstorm Gold Ltd. announced updates on its diverse stream and royalty portfolio. Referred to as "Sandstorm Gold Royalties," "Sandstorm," or the "Company," it shared this information eagerly. Listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol SAND and on the Toronto Stock Exchange as SSL, the Company presented various asset updates, with all dollar amounts in USD unless specified otherwise.

news.headline: 100GROUP showcased strong commitment to philanthropy in 2024, focusing on community support and spreading holiday joy.
news.summary: In Moorpark, California, as of February 24, 2025, 100GROUP showcased a strong dedication to giving back to the community and engaging in philanthropic endeavors during 2024. The focus was on bringing joy during the festive period by aiding families facing hardships and backing essential nonprofit groups.

news.headline: IsDB and KSrelief sign a $100M agreement to support sustainable dev in member countries through Lives & Livelihoods Fund.
news.summary: In Riyadh, Saudi Arabia on February 24, 2025, during the Riyadh International Humanitarian Forum, the Islamic Development Bank (IsDB) and King Salman Humanitarian Aid and Relief Centre (KSrelief) entered into a Donor Contribution Agreement (DCA) totaling US$100 million. This agreement spans over five years and aims to support humanitarian efforts.

news.headline: Company buys 20K Bitcoin for $2B, now holds close to 500K BTC in total as part of their "21/21 Plan."
news.summary: As part of its "21/21 Plan," Michael Saylor's Strategy has purchased 20,356 BTC for $1.99 billion, with each coin bought at an average price of $97,514. This acquisition was made possible following a $2 billion note offering.

news.headline: Google secures Salesforce cloud contract, aiming to rival Microsoft.
Steel Dynamics increases Q1 2025 cash dividend by 9% to $0.50 per share; authorizes $1.5B share repurchase.
news.summary: Fort Wayne, Indiana - On February 24, 2025, Steel Dynamics, Inc. revealed that its board of directors authorized a cash dividend of $0.50 per common share for the first quarter, showing a growth of 9% from its previous quarter in 2024. This was disclosed by the company listed as NASDAQ/GS: STLD.

news.headline: Constructor achieved record-breaking results in FY24, powering 250 billion shopper interactions and delivering hundreds of millions of personalized experiences daily. See its award-winning tech at eTail West.
news.summary: In the previous year, Constructor's product discovery platform facilitated 250 billion shopper interactions, resulting in hundreds of millions of personalized experiences daily. The innovative technology will be showcased at eTail West in SAN FRANCISCO and PALM SPRINGS, California on Feb. 24, 2025.

news.headline: MongoDB acquires Voyage AI for $220M to enhance AI search capabilities.
Leisa Zigman, former president of AGBT, joins Genome Partnership board, bringing leadership to genomics research.
news.summary: The Genome Partnership, host of AGBT meetings, revealed at the 25th AGBT General Meeting in Marco Island, Fla., that Leisa Zigman, ex-president of AGBT and a prominent journalist, has joined its board of directors. This addition underscores the organization's dedication to genomics research and collaboration. Zigman's appointment highlights her leadership skills and strong support for advancing genomics research.

news.headline: Tanger to attend Citi's CEO Conference on 3/3-3/5/2025, with President & CEO, EVP CFO participating. (Words: 85)
news.summary: In Greensboro, North Carolina, Tanger®, a prominent owner and operator of outlet and open-air retail shopping destinations, declared its involvement in Citi’s 2025 Global Property CEO Conference happening from March 3 to March 5, 2025. Stephen Yalof, the President and Chief Executive Officer, along with Michael Bilerman, the Executive Vice President, Chief Financial Officer, and Chief Investment Officer, will engage in a round table presentation set for 9:35 a.m. Eastern Time. Tanger® is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol SKT.

news.headline: KB Home opens new community in Palmetto, Florida. Located in Tampa. No specific numbers mentioned.
news.summary: In Palmetto, Florida, KB Home has revealed the opening of its latest community. The grand opening signifies the introduction of a new residential development for potential homebuyers in the area.

news.headline: Westlake Royal Building Products™ expands Grove Collection™ with column wraps, a nickel gap profile, and flat trim for outdoor spaces.
news.summary: Westlake Royal Building Products™, a subsidiary of Westlake Company (NYSE: WLK), has revealed the expansion of its Grove Collection™, an architectural PVC trim and mouldings line. The new additions include column wraps with caps and bases, a nickel gap profile, and flat trim. Grove Collection merges the classic appeal and luxurious appearance of stained wood with the durability of cellular PVC, making it ideal for improving outdoor living areas, porch ceilings, and soffits.

news.headline: Office Properties Income Trust extends deadline for private exchange offers relating to existing senior unsecured notes, to exchange for new 8.000% Senior Priority Guaranteed Unsecured Notes due 2030.
news.summary: In Newton, Massachusetts, Office Properties Income Trust (Nasdaq: OPI) shared updates on its private exchange offers. The Amendments to the exchange offers involve its senior unsecured notes due 2026, 2027, and 2031 (Existing Notes) being exchanged for new 8.000% Senior Priority Guaranteed Unsecured Notes due 2030 (New Notes) and related guarantees. These amendments have been made under the terms and conditions outlined in the Offering Memorandum. The exchange aims to facilitate the transition of Existing Notes into New Notes, providing investors with updated terms.

news.headline: Thousands participate in American Liver Foundation's Liver Life Walk 2025 across 17 in-person locations to support 100 million Americans affected by liver disease.
news.summary: In a show of solidarity, thousands come together to support the approximately 100 million individuals in the United States affected by liver disease. The American Liver Foundation (ALF) is organizing the 2025 Liver Life Walk at 17 physical locations nationwide. This event aims to raise awareness and funds for liver disease research and support services.

news.headline: Core Home acquired BUBLUV, brand combining Asian boba tea with health focus. Core Home owns 20+ houseware brands.
news.summary: The latest development in the corporate world came on February 24, 2025, as Core Home revealed its acquisition of BUBLUV, an emerging brand known for its unique blend of traditional Asian boba tea and contemporary health-focused concepts. Core Home, a major player in the industry, oversees a diverse portfolio of over 20 houseware brands, including BKLYN Steel Co., Core Bamboo, and Thyme. This strategic move signifies a notable expansion for Core Home, further solidifying its position in the market.

news.headline: Ampacity Renewables (formerly RP Construction Services) expands offerings at #IESNA2025 to meet growing power demand.
news.summary: In San Diego, Ampacity Renewables, formerly RP Construction Services, revealed their enhanced offerings at Intersolar & Energy Storage North America (#IESNA2025). The company introduced an expanded range of products and services aimed at driving the clean energy sector and addressing the rising power needs of the country. Choosing the name Ampacity, which signifies the maximum current a conductor can handle safely, reflects their focus on electric solutions.

news.headline: Ukraine and US close to agreement on country's mineral resources.
ImmunoPrecise Antibodies announces leadership changes with new Board of Directors member and interim CFO. Chris Buyse to depart.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, ImmunoPrecise Antibodies (IPA), a biotherapeutic research company utilizing AI technology, recently made key leadership changes. Kamil Isaev has been appointed to the Board of Directors and Joseph Scheffler is now the Interim Chief Financial Officer. This news also includes the upcoming departure of Chris Buyse from the Board. IPA, listed on NASDAQ as IPA, is focusing on enhancing its leadership team with Isaev's new role and Scheffler's appointment.

news.headline: Agilysys appoints Dan Bell as VP of North America Sales East - Hotels, Resorts and Cruises, focuses on PMS and POS growth.
news.summary: In Alpharetta, Georgia, Agilysys, Inc. revealed the addition of Dan Bell, a hospitality software expert, to its team. The Nasdaq-listed company appointed Mr. Bell as the Vice President for North America Sales East, focusing on Property Management Systems (PMS) and Point of Sale (POS) expansion within the Hotels, Resorts, and Cruises (HRC) sector. Mr. Bell's role targets growth in North America, a significant market for Agilysys. His appointment underlines the company's efforts to enhance its presence in the industry.

news.headline: FDA plans no advisory meeting for Brensocatib, with application under priority review. PDUFA target date: August 12, 2025.
news.summary: The FDA has confirmed that the application is currently undergoing priority review, with a PDUFA target action date set for August 12, 2025. Insmed Incorporated, a global biopharmaceutical company listed on Nasdaq as INSM, based in Bridgewater, N.J., is dedicated to prioritizing people's needs and aims to provide top-tier pharmaceutical solutions.

news.headline: Immunexpress will present new data at SCCM 2025 Congress, focusing on sepsis. Includes 2 posters.
news.summary: Immunexpress, Pty Ltd., a molecular diagnostic company specializing in enhancing outcomes for suspected sepsis patients, recently disclosed its involvement in the Society of Critical Care conference. The event, held in Seattle and Brisbane, Australia on February 24, 2025, showcased Immunexpress through the presentation of two posters. This participation underscores the company's commitment to advancing sepsis management and underscores their dedication to the medical community's professional development.

news.headline: Stewart Parker appointed president of Landsea Homes DFW division, brings 30 years of experience in homebuilding.
news.summary: With over 30 years of accomplished leadership in homebuilding in the Dallas-Fort Worth area, Landsea Homes Corporation (Nasdaq: LSEA) announced the appointment of Stewart Parker as their new addition. Parker, a well-known figure in the local homebuilding industry, brings a wealth of experience to his role at the publicly traded residential homebuilder. The appointment signifies a strategic move by Landsea Homes as they continue to expand their operations in the region. This development comes amidst Landsea Homes' growing presence in the market, as they aim to capitalize on the increasing demand for new housing in the area.

news.headline: McDermott expands health and life sciences practice with 4 new partners and opens Nashville office.
news.summary: On February 24, 2025, renowned legal firm McDermott Will & Emery announced the addition of four new partners to its Health & Life Sciences Practice Group. Ken Marlow, Wells Beckett, Stephen Page, and Spencer Green have joined from K&L Gates. This strategic move will see the group spearhead the opening of McDermott's new office.

news.headline: Charlotte's Web to enter Phase 2 FDA Clinical Trial for Autism Spectrum Disorder treatment. Feb. 24, 2025. (TSX: CWEB) (OTCQX: CWBHF)
news.summary: In Louisville, Colorado, on February 24, 2025, Charlotte's Web Holdings, Inc. (TSX: CWEB) (OTCQX: CWBHF), a prominent player in the hemp extract wellness industry, shared the news that the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) wrapped up its evaluation.

news.headline: Minimum-wage worker in U.S. needs to work 106 hours/week to afford $1,599 median-priced apartment. Data from Redfin.
news.summary: In Seattle, the median price for apartments is $1,599 per month. According to a report by Redfin, the average minimum-wage worker in the U.S. would need to work 106 hours per week in order to afford this price. The report, based on data from the three months ending on Jan. 31, 2025, and 2024 annual wage data, defines an apartment as affordable if the renter making minimum wage spends 30% of their income on rent. Redfin, a technology-powered real estate brokerage listed on NASDAQ as RDFN, conducted this analysis on the housing market.

news.headline: CHAR Tech CEO Andrew White named 2025 Changemaker by The Globe and Mail for decarbonizing steel industry.
news.summary: On February 24, 2025, CHAR Technologies Ltd. (TSXV:YES), a company specializing in sustainable energy solutions, shared news that their Founder and CEO, Andrew White, has been recognized as a 2025 Changemaker by The Globe and Mail. This acknowledgment celebrates White's significant contributions towards decarbonizing the steel industry. This accolade highlights his innovative efforts in transforming the sector.

news.headline: IHOP in Pasadena aims to break GUINNESS WORLD RECORDS title by serving most pancakes in 8 hrs during "20K for Pancake Day" event.
news.summary: An event called "20K for Pancake Day" was hosted by IHOP in Pasadena, California, aiming to break the Guinness World Records title for most pancakes served in eight hours. The event involved serving a target of 20,000 pancakes to participants.

news.headline: FedEx announced final results of exchange offers for senior notes, offering to exchange outstanding notes for new notes.
news.summary: FedEx Corp. disclosed the outcome of the Exchange Offers for its existing senior notes, as per which holders were invited to exchange their outstanding notes for new ones. The company revealed the final results, confirming success in completing the exchange. The Exchange Offers entailed all the existing senior notes listed in the tables, with the total number exchanged detailed in the accompanying announcement. Concurrently, FedEx also conducted Consent Solicitations seeking adoption of specific proposed amendments.

news.headline: AE Global partners with rePurpose Global to cut costs by tackling plastic waste through ocean-bound cleanup efforts.
news.summary: Miami-based company AE Global, specializing in customized packaging solutions, has extended its collaboration with rePurpose Global, the primary Plastic Action Platform globally. This partnership introduces an inventive sustainability initiative that supports cleanup of plastic waste in oceans. The program utilizes savings from packaging expenses and supply chain enhancements to fund these efforts. AE Global values the impact of sustainability and views the collaboration with rePurpose Global as a means to assist packaging clients in developing a sustainable strategy.

news.headline: Merz: We must do everything to improve economic competitiveness.
Fresenius Medical Care to sell select lab assets to Quest Diagnostics for dialysis services in US. Decided on Feb 24, 2025.
news.summary: In an effort to enhance services, a venture aims to deliver in-depth dialysis-related laboratory and water testing solutions to clinics affiliated with Fresenius Medical Care across the United States. This initiative is set to benefit Fresenius Medical Care, a provider listed on XETRA (FME) and NYSE (FMS), headquartered in BAD HOMBURG, Germany, and SECAUCUS, N.J., with the announcement made on Feb. 24, 2025. This collaboration is anticipated to improve the quality of care provided to a substantial number of patients within the network of owned and associated clinics.

news.headline: Aflac introduces new Accident policy with comprehensive post-accident therapy coverage. Improving recovery prospects for policyholders.
news.summary: Aflac Accident Insurance provides extensive coverage for post-accident treatment and therapy. The insurance, offered by Aflac Incorporated, a top provider of supplemental health insurance in the U.S., aims to address the unpredictability of accidents that can occur at any time and to anybody. The coverage includes a wide range of treatments and therapies to assist individuals in their recovery. This initiative was established on February 24, 2025, in Columbus, Georgia.

news.headline: Pronto to deploy 100+ autonomous haul trucks globally after successful pilots in North America.
news.summary: Heidelberg Materials, after successful trials in North America, will implement the Pronto Autonomous Haulage System at over twelve global sites using a mix of new and used rigid frame haul trucks. The deployment follows trials in North America and will occur in various locations around the world. The initiative was announced in San Francisco on Feb. 24, 2025, as confirmed by a press release.

news.headline: Virtusa recognized as Star Performer in Everest Group's Azure Services PEAK Matrix® 2024. Feb. 24, 2025 - SOUTHBOROUGH, Mass. - PRNewswire.
news.summary: Southborough, Massachusetts - On February 24, 2025, Virtusa Corporation, a leading global company offering digital strategy, digital engineering, and IT services, was named a Star Performer in Everest Group's Azure Services PEAK Matrix® 2024 evaluation. This accolade underscores the company's exceptional performance and expertise in the industry.

news.headline: TOYO Co., Ltd's warrants (ticker symbol TOYWF) now trading on OTCQB starting Feb. 24, 2025 - a solar solution company.
news.summary: On February 24, 2025, TOYO Co., Ltd (Nasdaq: TOYO), a leading solar solution company based in Tokyo, shared that its warrants can now be traded on the OTCQB under the symbol TOYWF. This development marks a significant milestone for the Company, providing investors with the opportunity to engage with TOYO's offerings. This move aligns with TOYO's commitment to expanding its market presence and enhancing accessibility for stakeholders.

news.headline: Energy Vault is building a 200 MW/2 hour battery energy storage system at ACEN Australia's New England Solar project.
news.summary: In Westlake Village, California and New South Wales, Australia, Energy Vault Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: NRGV) disclosed the initiation of construction for a significant project. The 200 MW/2-hour battery energy storage system is set to be installed at ACEN Australia’s New England Solar project. During a welcome ceremony, Energy Vault officials, ACEN Australia representatives, political figures, and local Anaiwan First Nations leaders came together to mark this milestone. This initiative underscores Energy Vault’s commitment to sustainable grid-scale energy solutions.

news.headline: Veritiv wins Silver Medal from EcoVadis for sustainability; recognized for business sustainability efforts.
news.summary: On February 24, 2025, Veritiv Operating Company, a prominent distributor of specialty packaging, disclosed that it has been awarded a Silver Medal by EcoVadis, a renowned firm in sustainability evaluations. This recognition underscores Veritiv's commitment to sustainability practices, as it strives to redefine the industry standards.

news.headline: Swarm Oncology and Cellex Cell announce strategic partnership to advance T cell therapies for cancers.
news.summary: A collaboration between Swarm Oncology Ltd., based in London, and a partner in Cologne, Germany, is underway to speed up the manufacturing and clinical development processes. Swarm Oncology, a biotechnology company focused on innovative T cell therapies for long-term remission in patients, announced this partnership on Feb. 24, 2025. This initiative aims to enhance the efficiency of manufacturing operations and clinical trials to benefit those in need.

news.headline: Jessica Holscott named CFO of Nielsen, effective Feb 24, 2025. She will lead global finance team.
news.summary: Nielsen, a renowned company specializing in audience measurement, data, and analytics, has appointed Jessica Holscott as its new Chief Financial Officer (CFO) on February 24, 2025. Jessica will take charge of Nielsen's worldwide finance department from today onwards. This strategic move aims to leverage Jessica's expertise in finance to advance the company's financial operations.

news.headline: Acurx's study reveals ibezapolstat's potential in CDI treatment by targeting specific bacteria, emphasizing its microbiome-restorative effect.
news.summary: A significant discovery has offered a mechanistic rationale for the selectivity of ibezapolstat (IBZ), indicating that the expected bactericidal bond between IBZ and its target DNA pol IIIC is maintained in a wide range of Bacillota phylum, encompassing C. difficile. It is noteworthy that this bond is conserved in most of the species within this phylum, indicating potential efficacy against a variety of organisms in this group.

news.headline: Touchstone Essentials launches Para-Shield gut health supplement to expand detox line. PRNewswire, Feb. 24, 2025.
news.summary: Touchstone Essentials, a company specializing in detox and wellness products sold through direct sales, has introduced Para-Shield, an herbal cleanse supplement, to complement their existing detox product line. The launch took place in Raleigh, North Carolina on February 24, 2025, as announced by Touchstone Essentials via PRNewswire. This new addition aims to enhance the company's offerings and is expected to be well received by consumers.

news.headline: Ulvera AI names Dr. Grant Stevens as new Executive Chairman, brings 30 years of experience in noninvasive fat reduction tech.
news.summary: In Tel Aviv, Israel, on February 23, 2025, Ulvera AI, a leading company in noninvasive fat reduction and body contouring technology, appointed Dr. Grant Stevens as its new Executive Chairman. With over 30 years of experience, Dr. Stevens will take on this role to lead the company forward in its innovative endeavors.

news.headline: Life Time offers free Ultimate Protein Reset for National Protein Day and Nutrition Month starting March 3; expert-led, 30-day program on Life Time app.
news.summary: On March 3, a 30-day program led by experts will start on the Life Time app, providing education, planning, and recipes for free. This initiative coincides with National Protein Day on February 27 and National Nutrition Month beginning on March 1. This program is being launched from CHANHASSEN, Minnesota, as per PRNewswire on February 24, 2025. Life Time, listed on NYSE, is facilitating this program for health-conscious individuals.

news.headline: Equinix to speak at 2 investor conferences; CEO Adaire Fox-Martin to speak at Citi 2025 Global Property Conference, March 3.
news.summary: Equinix, a leading digital infrastructure company based in Redwood City, California, shared today that its executives will be participating in two investor conferences. The first conference, Citi 2025 Global Property Conference, is scheduled for Monday, March 3, 2025. Adaire Fox-Martin, the CEO of Equinix, will represent the company at the event. Equinix is listed on the Nasdaq stock exchange under the ticker symbol EQIX.

news.headline: Empower Aesthetics partners with SeaMist MedSpa in Rhode Island, expanding national medical aesthetics platform.
news.summary: A national medical aesthetics platform called Empower Aesthetics, backed by private equity, has forged a new partnership with Rhode Island's top med spa. This announcement was made on Feb. 24, 2025, in Chicago. The company, Empower Aesthetics, revealed the collaboration, highlighting their move to team up with the leading med spa in Rhode Island.
